title: Henbrandt Mini Ducks with Net Bath Time Single Pack 6-Piece Game Set with 5 Ducks + 1 Net Kids Yellow Rubber Duck Toys Summer Fun Paddling Pool Games Bathtub Play for Boys and Girls
features: Single set of 5 Mini Yellow Ducks with Handheld Fishing Net.
These cheerful bright yellow ducks are perfect for splashy bath time fun with your child and adding some colour to the bathtime routine.
The bath time play set for kids includes: 5x Mini Yellow Ducks and 1x Net. Net colour may vary from that shown.
Size: the mini ducks measure approx. 3cm / 1inch. The net measures 21.5cm / 8.5inch in length.
Ages 3+. Do not leave children unsupervised when playing with the mini duck and net game set. This toy is not suitable for babies.
description: Product description Five little ducks went swimming one day, into the bath they’ve come to play! These cheerful bright yellow ducks are perfect for splashy bath time fun with your child and adding some colour to the bathtime routine. Let bathtime playtime commence – and make sure you count all 5 duckies as they go into the net so none of them swim over the hills and far away. Help your child practice their developing hand-eye co-ordination and fine motor skills as they scoop the ducks out of the water and make bath time a fun time while getting clean and learning about personal hygiene. The fun needn’t be limited to inside play either. On sunny summer days, the duck and net game can be taken outside for paddling pool play with friends. If you don’t have a paddling pool, why not fill a tub with water and bubbles and make scooping ducks from the suds a tabletop game for the garden. The mini duck game set also makes a fun gift or reward at birthday parties, summer fêtes, school fairs, classrooms, and more. The bath time playset includes 5 mini yellow ducks and 1 small handheld fishing net. The mini ducks measure approx. 2.5cm x 3cm and the net measures 21.5cm. Net colour may vary from that shown. Single mini duck and net game set for kids per order. Please note: These small ducks are not suitable for children aged under 3 years, as the size of the ducks may constitute a choking hazard for infants or toddlers. Parental supervision is recommended at all times while your children are playing. Once bathtime is over, allow the duck toys to dry before storing, either by air drying or using a towel. This will keep your game clean and free from mould, ensuring it lasts longer. This product carries the UKCA mark and is compliant with all applicable UK and EU safety requirements. Directions 1. Fill the bath or paddling pool with water. 2. Place the mini ducks in the water. 3. Use the net to scoop the ducks out of the water. 4. Dry the ducks after use to prevent mold.
